title: Reverie
body:
Reverie is a 16x Minecraft resource pack, the textures have vivid colours and are lovely to look at in-game. The resource pack is bright and cartoony.

### **REQUIRES OPTIFINE**

This resource pack is not complete and will continue to be developed by me any missing textures will be added over the course of future updates

Feel free to follow me on [Twitter](https://x.com/EphialPacks) or join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/yYMvNDqSV6) server for updates and a place to share your feedback, ideas and art.

 

Special thanks to
Blom
Stitch
Magma
Viper_

for all the feedback they've given me 

 

Thanks to Mariooo for the stunning screenshots with shaders.
